requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated Emissions and Radio Performance (IEC / ETSI-Referenced, Libyan Market)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——辐射发射及无线电性能（IEC / ETSI参考标准，利比亚市场）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——輻射發射及無線電性能（IEC / ETSI參考標準，利比亞市場）

summary.en: Libya does not have a fully developed independent national standards body equivalent to ETSI or CISPR. In practice, radio and telecom equipment imported into Libya is expected to conform to internationally recognised standards for radiated emissions and radio performance. ETSI EN standards (EN 300 328 for 2.4 GHz WLAN/Bluetooth, EN 301 893 for 5 GHz WLAN, EN 300 440 for short-range devices, EN 301 511 / EN 301 908 series for cellular) and IEC CISPR references are the most commonly cited technical benchmarks for submissions to LNCA. The 2.4 GHz band (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) is generally operational in Libya; 5 GHz deployment is limited and variable due to infrastructure damage from conflict. Test reports referencing internationally recognised standards from accredited laboratories are expected as part of any LNCA type-approval application, though procedural requirements are subject to prevailing government conditions.
summary.zh: 利比亚尚无等同于ETSI或CISPR的完善独立国家标准机构。实际操作中，进口至利比亚的无线电和电信设备须符合国际认可的辐射发射和无线电性能标准。ETSI EN标准（EN 300 328用于2.4 GHz无线局域网/蓝牙、EN 301 893用于5 GHz无线局域网、EN 300 440用于短距离设备、EN 301 511 / EN 301 908系列用于蜂窝网络）和IEC CISPR参考标准是向LNCA提交申请时最常引用的技术基准。2.4 GHz频段（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）在利比亚全境基本可运行；5 GHz部署因冲突导致的基础设施损毁而有限且不稳定。来自经认可实验室、引用国际公认标准的测试报告作为LNCA型式核准申请的组成部分被视为必要文件，但程序要求受当时政府条件影响。
summary.zht: 利比亞尚無等同於ETSI或CISPR的完善獨立國家標準機構。實際操作中，進口至利比亞的無線電和電信設備須符合國際認可的輻射發射和無線電性能標準。ETSI EN標準（EN 300 328用於2.4 GHz無線區域網路/藍牙、EN 301 893用於5 GHz無線區域網路、EN 300 440用於短距離裝置、EN 301 511 / EN 301 908系列用於蜂巢式網路）和IEC CISPR參考標準是向LNCA提交申請時最常引用的技術基準。2.4 GHz頻段（Wi-Fi、藍牙）在利比亞全境基本可運行；5 GHz部署因衝突導致的基礎設施損毀而有限且不穩定。來自經認可實驗室、引用國際公認標準的測試報告作為LNCA型式核准申請的組成部分被視為必要文件，但程序要求受當時政府條件影響。

standards_or_laws: ETSI EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz WLAN / Bluetooth radiated performance) — referenced for Libyan market submissions
ETSI EN 301 893 (5 GHz WLAN radiated performance) — referenced where 5 GHz is applicable
ETSI EN 300 440 (short-range devices, Bluetooth LE and similar)
ETSI EN 301 511 / EN 301 908 series (cellular GSM/UMTS/LTE radio conformance)
IEC CISPR 32 (emissions from multimedia equipment) — international reference standard
LNCA type-approval application requirements (subject to prevailing government conditions)

summary.en: China's SRRC type approval process tests Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular devices against GB/T standards (e.g. GB/T 22450.1 for 2.4 GHz WLAN, YD/T series for cellular) and MIIT radio performance specifications. These GB/T standards are technically similar in scope to ETSI EN but are separate documents and are not recognised by LNCA for type-approval purposes. SRRC approval and CCC do not satisfy Libyan LNCA requirements.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准流程依据GB/T标准（如2.4 GHz无线局域网GB/T 22450.1、蜂窝YD/T系列）及工信部无线电性能规范对Wi-Fi、蓝牙和蜂窝设备进行测试。这些GB/T标准在技术范围上与ETSI EN相似，但属于不同文件，LNCA在型式核准方面不予承认。SRRC批准和CCC不满足利比亚LNCA要求。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准流程依據GB/T標準（如2.4 GHz無線區域網路GB/T 22450.1、蜂巢式YD/T系列）及工信部無線電性能規範對Wi-Fi、藍牙和蜂巢式裝置進行測試。這些GB/T標準在技術範圍上與ETSI EN相似，但屬於不同文件，LNCA在型式核准方面不予承認。SRRC批准和CCC不滿足利比亞LNCA要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
GB/T 9254.1 (radiated emissions for ITE, China, aligned with CISPR 32)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC test reports based on GB/T standards are not accepted by LNCA as equivalent to internationally recognised ETSI EN or CISPR-referenced test reports. For any LNCA type-approval submission, test reports referencing ETSI EN 300 328, EN 301 893, EN 300 440, or the applicable CISPR standard from an accredited laboratory are required. Note that 5 GHz Wi-Fi coverage in Libya is limited and variable; equipment intended for 5 GHz operation should be assessed against local spectrum availability conditions. Existing CE-mark ETSI test reports may be accepted as supporting technical documentation by LNCA, but this is subject to prevailing procedural requirements and should be confirmed with a locally verified regulatory consultant.
gap.zh: 基于GB/T标准的中国SRRC测试报告不被LNCA视为国际认可的ETSI EN或CISPR参考测试报告的等同文件。任何LNCA型式核准申请均须提供来自经认可实验室、引用ETSI EN 300 328、EN 301 893、EN 300 440或适用CISPR标准的测试报告。请注意，5 GHz Wi-Fi在利比亚的覆盖范围有限且不稳定；拟用于5 GHz运行的设备须针对本地频谱可用条件进行评估。现有CE标志ETSI测试报告或可作为LNCA的技术佐证文件被接受，但须以当时的程序要求为准，并应由经过核实的本地监管顾问确认。
gap.zht: 基於GB/T標準的中國SRRC測試報告不被LNCA視為國際認可的ETSI EN或CISPR參考測試報告的等同文件。任何LNCA型式核准申請均須提供來自經認可實驗室、引用ETSI EN 300 328、EN 301 893、EN 300 440或適用CISPR標準的測試報告。請注意，5 GHz Wi-Fi在利比亞的覆蓋範圍有限且不穩定；擬用於5 GHz運行的裝置須針對本地頻譜可用條件進行評估。現有CE標誌ETSI測試報告或可作為LNCA的技術佐證文件被接受，但須以當時的程序要求為準，並應由經過核實的本地監管顧問確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in principle — enforcement fragmented due to conflict

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC test reports referencing GB/T standards are not accepted by LNCA for Libyan type-approval purposes. Test reports referencing ETSI EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 / EN 300 440 or applicable CISPR standards from an accredited laboratory are required. 5 GHz spectrum availability in Libya is variable and should be assessed for the specific deployment context.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 引用GB/T标准的中国SRRC测试报告不被LNCA用于利比亚型式核准所接受。须提供来自经认可实验室、引用ETSI EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 / EN 300 440或适用CISPR标准的测试报告。利比亚的5 GHz频谱可用性不稳定，须针对具体部署场景进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 引用GB/T標準的中國SRRC測試報告不被LNCA用於利比亞型式核准所接受。須提供來自經認可實驗室、引用ETSI EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 / EN 300 440或適用CISPR標準的測試報告。利比亞的5 GHz頻譜可用性不穩定，須針對具體部署場景進行評估。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted Emissions and Immunity (IEC CISPR / IEC 61000-Referenced, Libyan Market)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——传导发射与抗扰度（IEC CISPR / IEC 61000参考标准，利比亚市场）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——傳導發射與抗擾度（IEC CISPR / IEC 61000參考標準，利比亞市場）

summary.en: Libya references internationally recognised IEC CISPR and IEC 61000 series standards for conducted emissions and immunity requirements for information technology and communication equipment. Applicable international benchmarks include IEC CISPR 32 (emissions from multimedia equipment) and IEC CISPR 35 (immunity of multimedia equipment), as well as IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions) and IEC 61000-4 series (immunity test methods). Test reports must be produced by an internationally accredited laboratory and should cover the Libyan 230 V / 50 Hz supply environment. Libya's existing electrical infrastructure is predominantly 230 V / 50 Hz in modern installations, though supply quality and reliability are significantly affected by conflict-related infrastructure damage.
summary.zh: 利比亚以国际认可的IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列标准作为信息技术和通信设备传导发射与抗扰度要求的参考依据。适用的国际技术基准包括IEC CISPR 32（多媒体设备发射）和IEC CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度），以及IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流发射）和IEC 61000-4系列（抗扰度测试方法）。测试报告须由国际认可的实验室出具，并须覆盖利比亚的230V/50Hz供电环境。利比亚现有电力基础设施在现代装置中主要采用230V/50Hz，但供电质量和可靠性受到冲突导致的基础设施损毁的严重影响。
summary.zht: 利比亞以國際認可的IEC CISPR和IEC 61000系列標準作為資訊技術和通信設備傳導發射與抗擾度要求的參考依據。適用的國際技術基準包括IEC CISPR 32（多媒體設備發射）和IEC CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度），以及IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流發射）和IEC 61000-4系列（抗擾度測試方法）。測試報告須由國際認可的實驗室出具，並須涵蓋利比亞的230V/50Hz供電環境。利比亞現有電力基礎設施在現代裝置中主要採用230V/50Hz，但供電品質和可靠性受到衝突導致的基礎設施損毀的嚴重影響。

standards_or_laws: IEC CISPR 32 (emissions from multimedia equipment — international reference for Libyan market)
IEC CISPR 35 (immunity of multimedia equipment — international reference for Libyan market)
IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions, for mains-connected equipment)
Libyan 230 V / 50 Hz supply environment (modern installations; supply quality affected by conflict)

summary.en: China's GB/T 9254.1 / GB 9254.2 series (aligned with CISPR 32) and GB/T 17625 series (aligned with IEC 61000-3-x) govern conducted emissions and immunity for ITE and multimedia equipment. These are CISPR/IEC-aligned but represent separate national documents not recognised by LNCA. GB 9254 compliance is part of the CCC certification pathway for applicable products.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254.1 / GB 9254.2系列（与CISPR 32对齐）及GB/T 17625系列（与IEC 61000-3-x对齐）管控信息技术和多媒体设备的传导发射与抗扰度。这些标准与CISPR/IEC对接，但属于独立的国家文件，不被LNCA承认。GB 9254合规是适用产品CCC认证路径的组成部分。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254.1 / GB 9254.2系列（與CISPR 32對齊）及GB/T 17625系列（與IEC 61000-3-x對齊）管控資訊技術和多媒體設備的傳導發射與抗擾度。這些標準與CISPR/IEC對接，但屬於獨立的國家文件，不被LNCA承認。GB 9254合規是適用產品CCC認證路徑的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (immunity, aligned with IEC 61000-4 series, China)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC for applicable ITE

gap.en: EMC test reports citing Chinese GB/T 9254 or GB/T 17626 standards are not accepted by LNCA for type-approval purposes. Test reports must reference IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 or IEC 61000 series standards directly, as produced by an internationally accredited laboratory. The test environment must cover 230 V / 50 Hz supply conditions consistent with the Libyan grid. Note that Libya's power supply infrastructure has been significantly disrupted by conflict, and equipment should be designed for a degree of supply-quality tolerance. Where existing CE-mark CISPR test reports against the same standard editions are available, LNCA may accept these as technical supporting documentation, subject to procedural confirmation with a local regulatory consultant.
gap.zh: 引用中国GB/T 9254或GB/T 17626标准的电磁兼容测试报告不被LNCA用于型式核准目的所接受。测试报告须直接引用IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35或IEC 61000系列标准，由国际认可实验室出具。测试环境须覆盖与利比亚电网一致的230V/50Hz供电条件。请注意，利比亚的电力供应基础设施因冲突受到严重破坏，设备应具备一定的电源质量耐受能力。如已有针对相同标准版本的CE标志CISPR测试报告，LNCA或可将其作为技术佐证文件接受，须经本地监管顾问程序确认。
gap.zht: 引用中國GB/T 9254或GB/T 17626標準的電磁相容測試報告不被LNCA用於型式核准目的所接受。測試報告須直接引用IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35或IEC 61000系列標準，由國際認可實驗室出具。測試環境須涵蓋與利比亞電網一致的230V/50Hz供電條件。請注意，利比亞的電力供應基礎設施因衝突受到嚴重破壞，設備應具備一定的電源品質耐受能力。如已有針對相同標準版本的CE標誌CISPR測試報告，LNCA或可將其作為技術佐證文件接受，須經本地監管顧問程序確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in principle — enforcement fragmented due to conflict

source.publisher: IEC — International Electrotechnical Commission (CISPR 32 / IEC 61000 source standards); LNCA for Libyan market application

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC test reports citing Chinese GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17626 standards are not accepted for Libyan LNCA type-approval purposes. Test reports referencing IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 and IEC 61000-4 series standards, covering the 230 V / 50 Hz supply environment, from an internationally accredited laboratory are required. Supply quality tolerance is an additional design consideration given Libya's conflict-disrupted power infrastructure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 引用中国GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17626标准的电磁兼容测试报告不被利比亚LNCA型式核准所接受。须提供来自国际认可实验室、引用IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35和IEC 61000-4系列标准、覆盖230V/50Hz供电环境的测试报告。鉴于利比亚因冲突导致的电力基础设施破坏，电源质量耐受性是额外的设计考量。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 引用中國GB/T 9254 / GB/T 17626標準的電磁相容測試報告不被利比亞LNCA型式核准所接受。須提供來自國際認可實驗室、引用IEC CISPR 32 / CISPR 35和IEC 61000-4系列標準、涵蓋230V/50Hz供電環境的測試報告。鑑於利比亞因衝突導致的電力基礎設施破壞，電源品質耐受性是額外的設計考量。
